name: compliance source contract validator rejects when the plugin-internal fetcher field is missing
command:
mkdir -p compliance/sources && printf 'sources:
  - {id: x, name: x, url: x, authoritative_publisher: x, jurisdiction: x, applicable_to: [x], identifier_scheme: x, fetch_frequency: weekly, legal_review_required: false, paywalled: false, why_authoritative: "a
b
c"}
' > compliance/sources/internal.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-source-contract.sh" --registry compliance/sources/internal.yaml --tier plugin 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*fetcher' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
